headline: We will intervene on energy bills if necessary, says Miliband
deck: Oil and gas prices have surged due to the US-Israel war in Iran, with fears over the cost of living.

headline: Banknotes, beavers and a very British backlash
deck: Politicians are furious Churchill will be replaced on banknotes. The RSPCA wants rats and pigeons to feature.

headline: How the Iran war may affect your money and bills
deck: The conflict in the Middle East could raise the cost of petrol, household energy bills and even food.

headline: Games with loot boxes to get minimum 16 age rating across Europe
deck: The new changes by the Pan-European Game Information age-ratings body (PEGI) will start from June.

headline: AI toys for children misread emotions and respond inappropriately, researchers warn
deck: In first study of its kind, Cambridge researchers found AI toys could misread some children's emotions.

headline: Grammarly pulls AI author-impersonation tool after backlash
deck: Writers criticised the feature which used their names and styles as "AI personas" without consent.

headline: BBC visits aftermath of Israeli strike on Lebanon that killed family as IDF targets Hezbollah
deck: A relative tells BBC those killed were civilians and not Hezbollah operatives, but the Israel Defense Forces says it was targeting "terrorist infrastructure".

headline: Zelensky accuses EU allies of 'blackmail' in oil pipeline row
deck: Volodymyr Zelensky says restoring the flow of Russian oil via Ukraine into the EU would be like lifting sanctions on Russia.

headline: Severe flooding kills 62 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue
deck: Eleven people were rescued overnight after a minibus taxi got stuck in rising floodwaters in Nairobi.

headline: Iran vows to kill Israel's Netanyahu as impact of war on Gulf region widens
deck: Israel says it has killed two senior Iranian intelligence officials as oil loading reportedly resumes in the UAE's Fujairah port following a fire.

headline: U.S. and China economic chiefs meet in Paris to clear path to Trump-Xi summit
deck: Trade analysts said that with Washington's focus on the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran, prospects for a major trade breakthrough are limited.

headline: Price caps, taking the stairs, and short-sleeved shirts: How countries are coping with the Iran war energy shock
deck: Some countries have imposed price caps and released oil stockpiles to maintain energy supplies, while others are trying to reduce consumption.
